title.en: Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm, a forbidden Voi...

content.en:
Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm, a forbidden Void Realm.

Ouyang Jiu'er mobilized the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm and constantly defended against attacks from the outside world.

The concealment methods of the Forbidden Void Realm are not as good as the small realm of Black Wind Mountain, and it is difficult for the ancestor of the Half-Step Domain of the Guiyi Realm to find the small realm of Black Wind Mountain, but he can find the Forbidden Void Realm, so Ouyang Jiu'er has no way to hide it when he escapes into this Forbidden Void Realm.

Thundered!!!!

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, and many other half-step domain ancestors from the outside world continued to bombard this Forbidden Void Realm, trying to break the Forbidden Void Realm and capture Ouyang Jiu'er.

"Cold Moon Palace Lord, I didn't expect you to have not fallen yet, and you are also in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm. Unfortunately, you shouldn't be exposed. "

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said coldly, and the voice entered the Forbidden Void Realm.

Ouyang Jiu'er was very desperate, in fact, she had always been very careful, she had not participated in the many battles from Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm.

Even the last time, when the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm fought with the Devouring Clan, she hid it and did not participate, for fear of being discovered by the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

Anyway, she is just an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, her strength is far inferior to the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and she is not very useful.

Therefore, her participation in the big war is not very significant.

But not long ago, when she was competing for a treasure in a treasure land, she was recognized by an invincible Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

That Invincible Dao Ancestor was also a very ancient Invincible Dao Ancestor, and he had seen it as the Lord of the Cold Moon Palace, so even if Ouyang Jiu'er was reincarnated, he would also recognize Ouyang Jiu'er's Forbidden Dao Technique.

The other party didn't show any emotion at that time, and after returning to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, he reported it to the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

And so, the hunt began.

Fortunately, the True Martial Palace Master sent the message in time, otherwise, with the strength of her ordinary half-step domain ancestor, even if it was comparable to a half-step domain ancestor like the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, she was far from being the opponent of the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord.

Therefore, she withdrew to her Forbidden Void Realm in time, so that she could barely block the attack of the Dragon Shadow Palace Master with the help of the Forbidden Void Realm.

-----------------

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master, the Boundary Breaking Tower has been taken!"

The Lord of the Xuan Turtle Palace shuttled over, and a small tower appeared in his hand.

This small pagoda is one of the supreme treasures of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, specializing in breaking down the barriers of the world.

Although the defense of the Forbidden Void Realm was strong, if the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor held the Boundary Breaking Tower, it would be enough to break through the world barrier of the Forbidden Void Realm, and thus break into the interior of the Forbidden Void Realm.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master picked up the Boundary Breaking Tower and began to urge the Boundary Breaking Tower to bombard this Forbidden Void Realm.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The Boundary Breaking Tower turned into a shocking giant tower, breaking into the forbidden Void Realm world barrier in the depths of the void, and constantly hitting the world barrier.

Under the boundary-breaking power of the Boundary Breaking Tower, the world barrier began to crack.

Forbidden Void Realm.

Ouyang Jiu'er was very nervous, once the world barrier of the Forbidden Void Realm was broken, she would have nowhere to hide.

With the strength of the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, she can be easily captured.

"I wonder if anyone is coming to save me?"

Ouyang Jiu'er thought to herself.

She thought of Ye Tian, but even Ye Tian couldn't save her.

Although she heard about Ye Tian's battle record, she single-handedly killed many of the Devouring Clan's Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, and had a combat power comparable to that of the Guiyi Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors, but this kind of combat power was unstable and was improved by some means.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace could easily block Ye Tian just by sending the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, and if the Dragon Shadow Palace Master took another shot to capture her, Ye Tian would not be able to rescue her.

Unless the Wind Mountain Lord of Black Wind Mountain also made a move, how could the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord make a move?

Strictly speaking, she is the Cold Moon Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, a member of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and it is an internal contradiction that the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord catches her.

Therefore, it is not easy for Black Wind Mountain to interfere.

Moreover, she knew what she represented to the Heavenly Emperor Palace, once the Heavenly Emperor Palace caught her, the Haohai Sea Ancestor would definitely be rewarded in the future, and their status in the heart of the Haohai Sea Ancestor would naturally be higher.

Therefore, they would really go to war because he was an enemy of Black Wind Mountain, but Black Wind Mountain would not start a war with the Heavenly Emperor Palace for an outsider.

"My hope of escaping this catastrophe is too small!"

Ouyang Jiu'er muttered.

......

Outside.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord continued to bombard the world barrier with the Cracking Tower, causing the world barrier of the Forbidden Void Realm to crack constantly.

Finally—

Click!

The world barrier of the Forbidden Void Realm has been broken.

"Hahaha, Cold Moon Palace Lord, you're finished! Without this Forbidden Void Realm, with the strength of your ordinary half-step domain ancestor, how can you compete with us? Even if your strength is not far from the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, there is no way to escape. Even if you are given the strength of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, you are still an ant in front of the Heavenly Emperor Palace. Just take it, we won't kill you so quickly. I will definitely wait for the arrival of the Mighty Sea Ancestor before handing you over to him!"

The main path of the Dragon Shadow Palace.

But at this moment.

A voice came.

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master, Ouyang Jiu'er is my friend!"

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian came.

Seeing Ye Tian, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master changed their expressions.

When they saw that Ye Tian's cultivation had been promoted to a half-step domain ancestor, their expressions changed even more.

At the beginning, when Ye Tian was in the Invincible Dao Ancestor, he burst out with a combat power comparable to the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

And now, Ye Tianxiu has been promoted to the half-step domain ancestor level, isn't that combat power even more terrifying?

Therefore, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master and the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master were extremely jealous.

"Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, if the battle starts, I will block the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, and you will go and catch the Cold Moon Palace Master. Once you catch the Cold Moon Palace Lord, immediately retreat to the Heavenly Emperor Palace. There is a Heavenly Emperor Palace formation, even if the strength of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor is stronger than mine, he can't help our Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord reminded.

"Okay!"

The Lord of the Thunder Tribulation Palace responded.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian descended, looked directly at the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, and said, "Dragon Shadow Palace Master, give me a face, how about retreating?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said coldly: "The Cold Moon Palace Lord is a traitor to our Heavenly Emperor Palace, we arrest our own traitors, it's not good for the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors to interfere?"

Ye Tian sneered: "Traitor, what the situation is, you should know very well, and I won't argue with you." In this life, Ouyang Jiu'er is my friend, and has nothing to do with your Heavenly Emperor Palace, if you don't give me face, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will be my enemy. Besides, with me, you can't take Jiu'er away today!"

"Do it!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord urged the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord to say.
